name: Fly vs Giant
description: Tired of being swat? Its time to fight back! In Fly Revenge, you play as a tiny fly with a BIG grudge against the annoyed Giant who’s trying to squash you. Dodge swatters, newspapers, and slippers while aiming for the ultimate payback: annoy the Giant until he quits! Key Features: Intense Dodging Action: Weave through a barrage of household items aimed at your head. Epic Boss Battles: Face off against the Giant in multi-phase encounters with unique attack patterns.
instructions: Arrow Keys WASD Fly around Spacebar Repel objects back at the Giant Timing is key Touch Mobile-friendly controls included
